title: AN ACT NAMING THE POLICE REGIONAL OFFICE 11 AT SITIO CATITIPAN, BARANGAY COMMUNAL, BUHANGIN DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY AS CAMP QUINTIN M. MERECIDO

chunks.text:
H. No. 4659; 109 OG No. 32, 5505 (August 12, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10529, May 07, 2013 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE POLICE REGIONAL OFFICE 11 AT SITIO CATITIPAN, BARANGAY COMMUNAL, BUHANGIN DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY AS CAMP QUINTIN M. MERECIDO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Police Regional Office 11 at Sitio Catitipan, Barangay Communal, Buhangin District, Davao City is hereby named as Camp Quintin M. Merecido.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in any newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 6, 2011 and February 4, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 07 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
